episodes.title: The 2 YouTube Cults (I Almost Joined)
episodes.description:
The channel Visual Venture put out a video on cults on YouTube. I wanted to talk about 2 cults in particular one being lead by Leo Gura , and the other cult leader by Teal Swan “The Teal Tribe” 
Thanks for watching! 

Our 2nd channel https://youtube.com/@seeitthroughneweyes?si=mrWjoxpN05NZ-Rr8
